name: Job Offer-custom_title
label: Title
description: Salutation prefix (Mr./Ms./Dr.) used in the offer letter greeting. Optional — leave blank for no prefix.

name: Job Offer-custom_date_of_joining
label: Date of Joining
description: Candidate's confirmed start date. Required — used throughout the offer letter PDF.

name: Job Offer-custom_band
label: Band
description: Salary band / level (e.g. B3, L5). Used in offer letter Annexure A.

name: Job Offer-custom_joining_bonus
label: Joining Bonus
description: One-time bonus payable with first salary. Leave blank if not applicable.

name: Job Offer-custom_variable_pay_annual
label: Variable Pay (Annual)
description: Performance-linked annual variable pay. Leave blank if not applicable.

name: Job Offer-custom_acceptance_deadline
label: Acceptance Deadline
description: Last date by which candidate must accept the offer.

name: Job Offer-custom_offer_type
label: Offer Type
description: Determines which offer letter template is used. Full-time = standard offer (with salary table). Consultant = engagement letter. Intern = internship offer with stipend.

name: Job Offer-custom_engagement_duration_months
label: Engagement Duration (Months)
description: Consultant engagement length in months. Used in Consultant Offer Letter.

name: Job Offer-custom_professional_fees_monthly
label: Professional Fees (Monthly)
description: Consultant monthly retainer (excludes GST).

name: Job Offer-custom_stipend_monthly
label: Stipend (Monthly)
description: Intern monthly stipend amount.

name: Job Offer-custom_internship_duration_months
label: Internship Duration (Months)
description: Internship duration in months.

name: Job Offer-custom_zoho_sign_request_id
label: Zoho Sign Request ID
description: Set by send_offer_letter after Zoho Sign API call. Used by the webhook to look up which Job Offer a signed-document notification belongs to. Read-only — do not edit manually.

name: Job Offer-custom_zoho_sign_signed_at
label: Zoho Sign Signed At
description: Set by Zoho Sign webhook when all signers complete. Empty = signing still in progress (or never sent). Read-only — do not edit manually.

name: Salary Structure Assignment-custom_annual_ctc
label: Annual CTC
description: Annual CTC value used by Increment Letter. SSA has no native CTC field — HR fills this when creating/amending an SSA.

name: Salary Structure Assignment-custom_send_increment_letter
label: Send Increment Letter
description: Generate and email Increment Letter on SSA submit. Uncheck for initial salary creation (not an actual increment).

name: Salary Structure Assignment-custom_increment_letter_generated
label: Increment Letter Generated
description: Marker set automatically after Increment Letter PDF is generated and attached.

name: Employee Separation-custom_send_experience_letter
label: Send Experience Letter
description: Generate and email Experience Letter on Separation submit.

name: Employee Separation-custom_send_relieving_letter
label: Send Relieving Letter
description: Generate and email Relieving Letter on Separation submit.

name: Employee-custom_promotion_letter_attached
label: Promotion Letter Attached
description: Marker set automatically after Promotion Letter PDF is generated and attached.

name: Employee-custom_service_certificate_issued_at
label: Service Certificate Last Issued
description: Date of the most recent Service Certificate issued for this employee.

name: Employee-custom_greythr_employee_id
label: greytHR Employee ID
description: greytHR's internal employee UUID (e.g. '270'). Set by pull_employees sync — used to look up Frappe records by greytHR identity. Read-only — do not edit manually.

name: Employee-custom_greythr_last_synced
label: greytHR Last Synced
description: Timestamp of the last successful pull from greytHR for this record. Null = never synced. Read-only.

name: Employee-custom_greythr_full_name
label: greytHR Full Name (Source)
description: Original combined name string from greytHR (e.g. 'Gandla Sanjeev'). Preserved verbatim for audit when Frappe's first_name/last_name are auto-split. Read-only.

name: Employee-custom_fit_to_rehire
label: Fit to Rehire
description: HR's rehire eligibility flag for ex-employees. Pulled from greytHR's fitToBeRehired field on the separation endpoint.
